constitution_summary: Ethical AI only; no gambling or illegal content; sustainable compute framing.

task_families.label: Short Q&A
task_families.description: Answer in one or two sentences from a natural-language question.

task_families.label: Summarization
task_families.description: Summarize supplied text in one sentence.

task_families.label: Classification
task_families.description: Constrained categorical answer (e.g. yes/no, risk tier).
task_families.implementation: task_templates; LLM with explicit output format

task_families.label: Light extraction
task_families.description: Extract one fact or risk line from a short passage.
task_families.notes: Add JSON schema validation if buyer requires structured output.

task_families.label: HTTP miner worker
task_families.description: POST /task accepts query; returns LLM response for validator scoring.
task_families.notes: Default port 8043 conflicts with api_seller_x402; set COMPUTE_MINER_PORT.

task_families.label: External price / oracle data
task_families.description: Return live market data; not LLM-only.
task_families.implementation: not implemented as first-class; Arcana-style buyer calls only
task_families.notes: Requires dedicated adapter + disclosure if LLM is used as fallback.

task_families.label: Marketplace-specific listing
task_families.description: Agoragentic or similar per-listing POST schema.
task_families.notes: One tested integration per listing ID before advertising.
